characters.name: Aichan (Sample Character)
characters.description: Public sample character bundled with image-arranger: Aichan, a small demon-themed anime girl with magenta-violet hair, red horns, red eyes, compact bat wings, a devil tail, black hoodie, purple check dress, choker, gloves, stockings, and black boots. / image-arranger 同梱の公開サンプルキャラクター「AIちゃん」。ベースにはキー画像と設定資料を登録します。

master.overview: Aichan base references / AIちゃんベース参照
master.prompt: Aichan character reference: small demon-themed anime girl, magenta-violet layered shoulder-length hair with hot pink underside, red curved horns, red eyes, black choker, black hoodie, purple check dress with lace trim, black gloves, thigh-high stockings, black boots, compact red-black bat wings, long purple devil tail with red heart tip; keep identity, outfit, wing size, horn size, and tail shape consistent; no text, no logo, no watermark
